criteria.text: `verdi accept` of a feature spec carrying a whole-spec `supersedes` edge to a feature predecessor flips that predecessor's `status` from `accepted-pending-build` to `superseded` in the same acceptance commit — a sanctioned status-only edit (VL-010's existing frozen-file exception, no new rule) that mirrors the rung-3 story flip and leaves the rung-4 cascade/blast-radius machinery for downstream stories untouched

a superseded spec's terminal state renders — not deleted, not silent — on every surface that renders specs (`verdi matrix`, the board, dex), at both the story and feature rungs, so finding it never requires reading raw frontmatter or chasing a `superseded-by` backlink
